title: Question Title in FORMS not propagating correctly after duplication
excerpt: I used “Duplcate Question” to create a survey form. I then edited the questions that I duplicated. But on the “Analyze” tab in the workform it does not propagate the new questions. It shows up as “Dup. of Dup. of Dup. of…

posts.author: Shepherd (John krogh)
posts.cookedHtml: I used “Duplcate Question” to create a survey form. I then edited the questions that I duplicated. But on the “Analyze” tab in the workform it does not propagate the new questions. It shows up as “Dup. of Dup. of Dup. of Dup. of Dup. of Dup. of Dup. of Balancing tactical and strategic responsibilities” On the survey itself, it shows up with the correctly edited questions. On the link to a monday board and on the analyze tab, it does not propogate the new name… Anyoneelse experiencing this?
